name: WFG National Title Insurance Company
description_short: WFG National Title Insurance Company provides title insurance, escrow services, and real estate closing solutions across Colorado with digital tools for agents, lenders, buyers, and sellers.
description_long:
WFG National Title Insurance Company operates as a title insurance and escrow services provider with a regional presence in Colorado. The company maintains five offices across the state (Cherry Creek, Colorado Springs, Denver Tech Center, North Metro, and a Commercial office) and serves the real estate transaction market through both agents/lenders and direct consumer channels.

The company's core offerings include title insurance, escrow services, and closing facilitation. WFG provides real-time access to closing documents through their MyHome platform, wire fraud prevention tools, rate calculators, seller net sheet estimations, and earnest money deposit management through their ZOCCAM app. They also offer market analysis tools through FETCH by WFG, a property information aggregation platform with mapping, filtering, and tax/lien data capabilities. Additional services include Colorado ValueCheck, E-Closing solutions, document libraries, and integration with third-party tools like Updater for post-closing customer support.

WFG differentiates itself through customer experience focus, claiming to "reimagine the customer experience" around stated "Cornerstones." The company emphasizes security and fraud prevention, explicitly warning customers that WFG will never request wire transfers via email. Their MyHome platform provides centralized access to transaction information with real-time updates, and FETCH by WFG combines multiple property data sources into a single searchable interface. The ZOCCAM earnest money app is positioned to reduce risk and transaction time versus traditional methods.

This company is a legitimate title insurance and escrow services provider serving the Colorado real estate market. However, it is fundamentally a B2B service provider for agents and lenders, with consumer-facing tools as secondary offerings. Individual buyers and sellers benefit mainly through their agent or lender's relationship with WFG. The company does not originate mortgages or provide lending—it handles the transactional infrastructure (title, escrow, closing) that sits alongside mortgage financing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Five physical office locations across Colorado for local service access
MyHome platform provides real-time, centralized access to all closing documents and transaction updates
FETCH by WFG aggregates multiple property data sources (tax, mortgage, lien data) into single searchable map-based interface
ZOCCAM earnest money deposit app reduces security risk and transaction time versus physical courier methods
Explicit wire fraud prevention messaging and commitment to never request transfers via email
Free Updater integration helps post-closing clients organize moving and utility setup tasks
Rate calculator and seller net sheet tools provide instant fee transparency before closing
cons: Primarily a B2B service provider—individual consumers access WFG mainly through their agent or lender, limiting direct control
No mortgage origination or lending products; company handles only the title, escrow, and closing infrastructure
Website content focuses heavily on agent/lender tools (FETCH, rate calculators, net sheets) with less direct consumer information
Service area limited to Colorado; not a national provider despite the company name
No publicly available information on complaint resolution, customer satisfaction metrics, or independent ratings
best_for: Colorado real estate agents and loan officers seeking integrated closing management and property data tools
Buyers and sellers in Colorado using agents or lenders that partner with WFG for title and escrow services
Real estate investors and wholesalers needing map-based property filtering, tax data, and lien research through FETCH
Lenders and title companies looking for white-label or partnership opportunities in the Colorado market
diagnosis: WFG National Title is best for Colorado real estate professionals (agents, lenders, brokers) and their clients seeking integrated closing services with modern digital tools and fraud prevention. The main caveat is that this is a B2B service provider, not a direct-to-consumer lender or financial product company—individual buyers and sellers benefit primarily through their agent or lender's relationship with WFG, not through direct engagement.
services: Title insurance and escrow services for residential real estate transactions
MyHome platform—centralized online access to closing documents and real-time transaction updates
FETCH by WFG—property information aggregation with map-based searching, filtering, and tax/mortgage/lien data
Rate calculator for instant title and escrow rate quotes based on transaction details
Seller net sheet—itemized fee and expense estimates showing seller proceeds
ZOCCAM earnest money deposit app for secure, digital earnest money transfer
Colorado ValueCheck—presumed property valuation or market analysis tool (limited detail on website)
E-Closing solutions for digital closing execution
Documents library—presumably templates and closing-related documentation
My Real Estate Nerds—tool evaluation and product review service for real estate professionals
Updater partnership—free post-closing moving and utility management tool for consumers
Wire fraud prevention and security safeguards for transactions
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 7800 E Union Ave suite 410, Denver, CO 80237
